text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I make my way to the track a little<n>early for
morning training. As soon as<n>I arrive...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, looks like I'm first again! Ah, it<n>sure feels
good to be number one in<n>everything! ♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Okay, time to get changed! I'm going<n>to run my
heart out today!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet seems to be in a very<n>good mood
as she prepares to train.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: You... you were here before me?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
No! I thought I was the first one to<n>arrive! I can't
believe I'm second!
choice_data_list: Do you always come this early?
Do you always come this early?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
No! I thought I was the first one to<n>arrive! I can't
believe I'm second!
choice_data_list: Do you always come this early?
Do you always come this early?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I suppose you could call me a<n>morning
person. Although it seems<n>you got the better of
me today.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
The morning is when I can<n>concentrate the best. I
can run freely<n>without worrying about others<n>
watching me.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm always aiming to be number one.<n>I want to
be the first to arrive at school<n>and the runner who
completes the<n>most laps.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
It's not the same! Being second<n>place is out of
the question! It's first<n>or nothing!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Getting here early just doesn't hit<n>the same way
if I'm not number one!<n>Ugh, I'm so, so, so
ANGRY!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You won't be so lucky tomorrow! I'm<n>gonna be
first to school for sure!
